XM

XM Tech Co., Ltd. is a tech company focused on the research, production, and sales of smart wearable devices. We follow the idea of "Tech for all, connected life," and aim to create high-quality, affordable smart wearable products for users. With a mature supply chain and strong R&D capabilities, we focus on core needs like sports health and smart interaction. Centered on user experience, we keep launching practical and stylish smart wearable devices. Our core product, the Mi Band series, has become a leading

🔬 R&D Center

During the R&D of the Xiaomi Band, we overcame three core challenges: balancing long battery life with high performance, improving health monitoring accuracy, and ensuring waterproof durability in a slim design. With low-power scheduling algorithms, AI noise reduction and integrated sealing technology, it achieved up to 21-day battery life, professional-grade health tracking and IP68 waterproofing, quickly becoming a global hit wearable device.

Health-Tracking Wearables Development，Smart Wearable Device R&D

High-Precision Health Monitoring

Using AI noise reduction technology, it delivers professional-grade health tracking and improved monitoring accuracy.

the Xiaomi Smart Band

289.9 YUAN

a stylish and lightweight wearable device. It can instantly remind you of incoming calls and messages. Equipped with professional fitness tracking and sleep monitoring functions, it helps you keep track of your physical condition. The silent vibration alarm will wake you up gently without disturbing others. It also supports convenient NFC payment and features 50-meter water resistance, so you can wear it while washing hands or swimming. It is a practical companion for daily study and life.

wireless earbuds

Equipped with advanced DSP call noise reduction technology, it precisely cancels out ambient noise and filters background interference, preserving clear and rich call audio.
